[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010000001 2
1 1111000001 5
2 0010100111 5
3 0001100001 3
4 0110011001 5
5 0010110111 6
6 1111001101 7
7 0110101111 7

12 1011010001 5
